blocks.text: Draft me a confidentiality clause for a Series B term sheet between a UK manufacturing company and a US lead investor. Standard market terms; mutual; 3-year survival.

blocks.thinking:
The user wants me to draft a confidentiality clause for a Series B term sheet. Let me break this down:

1. It's a Series B term sheet (financing document)
2. Parties: UK manufacturing company (issuer) and US lead investor
3. Needs: mutual confidentiality, 3-year survival

This is a straightforward drafting task - no document to read, no redline, no playbook needed. I should draft a clause in plain text for the lawyer to review.

Let me create a todo list and then draft the clause.

arguments.content:
- [ ] Draft mutual confidentiality clause
- [ ] Ensure 3-year survival term
- [ ] Adapt for UK issuer / US investor dynamic
- [ ] Verify market-standard provisions
